news.headline: Fake BBC report spreads false claim that Zelensky has a stolen painting
news.summary: A fake BBC news report claims that Ukrainian president Volodymyr Zelensky is displaying a stolen painting by artist Paul Cézanne in his office. However, it turns out that the “report” features doctored footage of Zelensky with the painting photoshopped onto his wall.

news.headline: Tornado sweeps through Oklahoma City
news.summary:
On Thursday, a tornado of rare intensity swept through the city of #Enid, Oklahoma, leaving behind a scene of devastation.
 
The disaster left at least 10 people injured. Footage of the event has gone viral on social media.

news.headline: Sanchez brushes off reported Pentagon email mulling suspending Spain's NATO membership
news.summary: Spain's centre-left Prime Minister Pedro Sanchez on Friday declined to comment on a reported Pentagon email written by top policy adviser Elbridge Colby raising the possibility of suspending Madrid from the NATO military alliance.
